claim: CDSL endured by repeatedly converting fragile personal scholarship into maintainable shared infrastructure.
The June snapshot has two legitimate repository populations: 78 API inventory records and 76 transformed activity-table records.
OBS-T contains 52,498 documented events across 43 dictionaries and 208 corrector labels.
Correction implementation is highly concentrated: at most four implementers per year and a 64–100% annual lead share.
1994 is the founding milestone; 2014 is the public-GitHub governance milestone; 2019 is only the first-PR milestone.
Repository records reveal public workflow but systematically under-record pre-2014 correspondence, informal labour, and identity.
